query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "efficientrollout: system-aware self-speculative decoding for rl rollou" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (speculative decoding) and domain (LLM inference efficiency) as the user's question, even though it applies the technique to safety constraints rather than RL rollouts. It provides essential prior work on the "system-aware" or "model-aware" application of speculative sampling that a literature review on extending EfficientRollout would need to cite to contextualize the method's versatility.
